help.title: Help & Support
help.q1: How do I post a job?
help.a1: Go to Home → 'Post a Job' → fill details → submit. Your job will be visible to nearby service providers.
help.a2: Use the Search tab or browse categories on the Home screen. You can filter by distance, category, and availability.
help.a3: Yes! The app is completely free. You can post jobs, search workers, and chat without any charges.
help.q4: How do I report a user?
help.a4: Open the user's profile → tap the report button → select a reason → submit.

about.title: About
about.description: A hyperlocal mobile app that connects customers with nearby workers like plumbers, electricians, masons, and labour through job posting, local discovery, and real-time chat.

assignedJobs.noCompletedJobsHint: Jobs marked as complete by the employer will appear here

terms.title: Terms & Privacy
terms.termsContent:
Effective Date: 20 April 2026

Welcome to Kaamspot. By creating an account or using our app, you agree to these Terms of Service.

1. About Kaamspot
Kaamspot is a local services marketplace that connects people who need work done (employers) with skilled workers and service providers such as plumbers, electricians, carpenters, painters, AC repair technicians, and more.

2. Eligibility
You must be at least 18 years of age to use Kaamspot. By using the app, you confirm that you are of legal age to enter into a binding agreement.

3. User Accounts
You may sign up using email/password or Google sign-in. You are responsible for keeping your login credentials secure. Each person may only maintain one account.

4. How Kaamspot Works
- Employers can post jobs with details such as title, description, category, budget, location, and required dates.
- Workers can browse nearby jobs, express interest via chat, and get assigned to jobs.
- Both parties can communicate through in-app real-time chat, including sharing images.
- After job completion, users can rate and review each other.

5. User Conduct
You agree not to:
- Post false, misleading, or fraudulent job listings or profiles.
- Harass, abuse, or send spam to other users.
- Upload inappropriate, offensive, or illegal content.
- Attempt to circumvent the app for unauthorized purposes.
Violation of these rules may result in account suspension or permanent ban.

6. Payments & Transactions
Kaamspot facilitates connections between employers and workers. Any payment arrangements, negotiations, and transactions are made directly between the parties. Kaamspot is not responsible for payment disputes.

7. Ratings & Reviews
Users may leave ratings (1-5 stars) and written reviews after job completion. Reviews must be honest and relevant. We reserve the right to remove reviews that violate our guidelines.

8. No Guarantee
Kaamspot is a platform for connecting users. We do not guarantee the quality, safety, or reliability of any services provided by workers, nor do we guarantee that employers will fulfill payment obligations. Users interact at their own risk.

9. Content Ownership
You retain ownership of content you post (job listings, images, reviews). By posting, you grant Kaamspot a non-exclusive license to display this content within the app.

10. Account Termination
We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms. You may delete your account at any time through Settings.

11. Limitation of Liability
Kaamspot is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for any damages arising from the use of the app, interactions between users, or services performed.

12. Changes to Terms
We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the app after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

13. Contact Us
If you have questions about these terms, contact us at support@kaamspot.com.
terms.privacyContent:
Effective Date: 20 April 2026

Kaamspot respects your privacy. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights.

1. Information We Collect

Account Information:
- Full name, email address, and phone number (optional)
- Profile photo
- Password (securely hashed, managed by Clerk authentication service)
- Google account details (if you sign in with Google)

Profile Information:
- Work title/profession and bio
- City, locality, and state
- Availability status and preferred work radius
- Usage preference (employer or worker)

Location Data:
- Precise GPS coordinates (latitude/longitude) when you grant permission
- Location derived from pincode or manual map selection
- Used to show nearby jobs, calculate distances, and match workers with employers

Job & Activity Data:
- Job listings you post (title, description, category, budget, dates, images)
- Jobs you view, apply to, or are assigned to
- Ratings and reviews you give or receive
- Job completion history

Communications:
- Chat messages and image attachments exchanged with other users
- Message timestamps and read status

Device & Technical Data:
- Device platform (iOS/Android)
- Push notification token (Expo Push Token)
- App version and device information

2. How We Use Your Data
- To create and manage your account
- To show you relevant nearby jobs and workers based on your location
- To enable real-time chat between employers and workers
- To send push notifications about new messages, job updates, and activity
- To display ratings, reviews, and job history on profiles
- To improve the app experience

3. Third-Party Services
We use the following third-party services to operate the app:
- Clerk: Authentication and account management
- Google Maps: Map display and geocoding (address/pincode lookup)
- Firebase Cloud Messaging: Push notifications on Android
- Apple Push Notification Service: Push notifications on iOS
- Expo: App framework and notification delivery

These services may process certain data according to their own privacy policies.

4. Data Sharing
- We do NOT sell your personal information to any third party.
- Your profile information (name, photo, work title, city, ratings) is visible to other Kaamspot users.
- Chat messages are only accessible to the participants of that conversation.
- We may share data if required by law or to protect the safety of our users.

5. Data Storage & Security
- Your data is stored on secure servers.
- Chat messages and images are stored securely and encrypted in transit.
- Push notification tokens are stored to deliver notifications to your device.
- Profile images are compressed and securely uploaded.

6. Your Rights
- Access: You can view your data in your profile and settings.
- Update: You can edit your profile information at any time.
- Delete: You can request account deletion through Settings. This will remove your profile, job listings, and associated data.
- Location: You can revoke location permission at any time through your device settings.
- Notifications: You can disable push notifications through your device settings.

7. Data Retention
We retain your data as long as your account is active. Upon account deletion, your personal data is removed. Some data (e.g., reviews you left for others) may be anonymized and retained.

8. Children's Privacy
Kaamspot is not intended for users under 18 years of age. We do not knowingly collect data from minors.

9. Changes to This Policy
We may update this privacy policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes through the app.

10. Contact Us
For privacy-related questions or data requests, contact us at support@kaamspot.com.
